ad_name: Asiakastarina: Tuntuvat paremmilta kuin 500€ lasit — Naiset 45-54

structure.note: Single-image + motion prompt. Raw UGC phone-filmed look. Product references for accuracy. Kling 2.5 Turbo Pro.

avatar_prompt: Photorealistic portrait of a Finnish/Nordic woman, age 50, natural light blonde shoulder-length hair typical Scandinavian style, wearing a soft cream-white knit sweater. Warm genuine smile showing slight surprise, kind light blue Nordic eyes, fair skin with natural freckles. Soft natural daylight from a kitchen window in a cozy Finnish home. Shallow depth of field, creamy warm bokeh. Shot on professional camera, detailed skin texture, minimal natural makeup. Upper body framing, looking directly at camera. 9:16 vertical portrait orientation. High-end lifestyle photography.

talking_head.full_script: Mä maksoin ennen yli viissataa euroa laseista. Sit mä löysin Banaanin. Kahdet lasit, yheksällä kympillä. Nää tuntuu paremmilta ku ne ylihinnotellut viidensadan euron lasit. Ja näiden Hinta-laatusuhde on loistava. Kokeile itekin, banaanieyewear.fi.

script_breakdown.line: Mä maksoin ennen yli viissataa euroa laseista.
Nää tuntuu paremmilta ku ne ylihinnotellut viidensadan euron lasit.

broll_clips.image_prompt: Eyeglasses sitting on a glass shelf in an optician shop, harsh overhead fluorescent lighting, reflections on glass cases, slightly messy display with price tags visible. Shot on phone camera, slightly off-center framing, not perfectly sharp. Everyday retail environment, nothing fancy. 9:16 vertical.
broll_clips.motion_prompt: Shaky handheld camera pans across shelf, natural phone filming wobble, someone quickly scanning products in a store

broll_clips.image_prompt: Small brown cardboard delivery box just opened on a messy kitchen table, glasses case peeking out from tissue paper. Morning light from window, coffee mug nearby with coffee ring stain on table. Real lived-in kitchen, not styled. Phone camera quality, slightly overexposed from window light. 9:16 vertical.
broll_clips.motion_prompt: Quick excited handheld movement zooming into the open box, fingers almost reaching in, natural phone shaking from excitement of unboxing

broll_clips.image_prompt: Two pairs of eyeglasses matching the reference photos placed casually on a wrinkled bedsheet or kitchen counter, not perfectly arranged. Natural indoor light, one pair slightly overlapping the other. Real casual moment, someone just put them down to take a quick phone pic. Slightly warm phone camera tone. 9:16 vertical.
broll_clips.motion_prompt: Hand adjusts one pair then pulls back to show both, casual handheld phone filming with natural micro-shakes and slight refocus

broll_clips.image_prompt: Close-up of the exact glasses from reference photo being held in someone's hand against a blurry living room background. Natural afternoon light, you can see fingerprints on the lens. Real authentic moment of someone examining their new glasses. Phone camera, shallow depth of field from phone portrait mode. 9:16 vertical.
broll_clips.motion_prompt: Hand slowly rotates the glasses to show different angles, casual natural movement like showing a friend, slight phone camera wobble

broll_clips.image_prompt: Extreme close-up of the glasses frame hinge and temple detail from reference photo, shot really close with phone camera so it's slightly soft focus. You can see the material quality and finish. Against a neutral blurry background. Phone macro shot, not a studio product photo. 9:16 vertical.
broll_clips.motion_prompt: Slow subtle movement as someone holds phone very close to the frame detail, slight natural breathing movement, focus shifts slightly

broll_clips.image_prompt: Glasses from reference photo sitting on an open book next to a half-drunk coffee cup on a couch armrest. Cozy blanket visible, real lived-in Nordic home. Afternoon light through curtains. Not styled, just casually placed. Phone camera selfie perspective looking down. 9:16 vertical.
broll_clips.motion_prompt: Lazy casual pan down to show the glasses in context, natural relaxed filming like posting to Instagram stories

broll_clips.image_prompt: Three different pairs of glasses from reference photos spread out on a kitchen table next to laptop and coffee. Natural daylight, slightly cluttered real desk. Casual overhead shot as if someone held their phone above to snap a quick pic for social media. Not a styled flat-lay. 9:16 vertical.
broll_clips.motion_prompt: Quick overhead phone pan across all three pairs, casual reveal movement like filming for TikTok or stories, natural authentic motion
